metadata.title: Explore Senegal — Discover the Soul of Senegal
metadata.description: Authentic tours in Senegal: Lac Rose, Gorée Island, Mbodienne, Nianing Baobab and more.

hero.title: Discover the Soul of Senegal
hero.subtitle: Live authentic experiences with a passionate local guide. From the dunes of Lac Rose to the historic streets of Gorée.

sections.whyUs: Travel with the Soul of Africa
sections.newsletterSub: Receive our latest offers and travel inspirations.

whyUs.localExpertDesc: A guide born and raised in Senegal, with intimate knowledge of every corner.
whyUs.authenticDesc: No classic tourist circuits. Experience Senegal like a local.
whyUs.smallGroupsDesc: Intimate groups for a personalized and unforgettable experience.
whyUs.customDesc: Each tour can be adapted to your wishes and pace.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Want to plan your adventure? Write to us!
contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.whatsapp: Or write to us on WhatsApp

footer.tagline: The Modern Griot Experience. Creating a bridge between ancestral traditions and modern digital exploration of the Teranga spirit.

admin.welcomeSub: Here's what's happening with Explore Senegal today.
